articles.title: Chris Mason: Healey's resignation is a devastating critique of Starmer's government
articles.description: An already politically weakened prime minister has been weakened further by the resignation of the defence secretary.

articles.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
articles.description: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.

articles.title: Police officer, 19, dies from crash injuries
articles.description: Jess Turnbull "had so much to look forward to in her career and her life", the chief constable says.

articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo on heartbreak and choosing her wedding song
articles.description: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
